# Third-party browser assets

## Cytoscape.js

- Package: `cytoscape`
- Version: `3.34.0`
- License: MIT
- Source artifact: `https://registry.npmjs.org/cytoscape/-/cytoscape-3.34.0.tgz`
- Vendored runtime file: `web/vendor/cytoscape-3.34.0.min.js`
- Integrity from npm pack: `sha512-62rNSrioXw93u[...]I48ZEZGjywSOg==`

The SPA serves this file from `/app/assets/cytoscape-3.34.0.min.js`; it must not load Cytoscape or graph-layout code from a CDN.
